data.title: DIC Corporation Announces Increased Year-End Dividend Forecast
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest update is out from DIC ( (JP:4631) ).

DIC Corporation has revised its year-end dividend forecast for fiscal year 2025, increasing it significantly due to successful asset reduction efforts. The company plans to distribute a total annual dividend of ¥200.00 per share, including a special dividend, as part of its strategy to provide additional returns to shareholders and optimize management resources.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4631) stock is a Buy with a Yen4000.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on DIC stock, see the JP:4631 Stock Forecast page.

data.title: BNK Banking Corporation to Announce Full-Year Financial Results
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest update is out from BNK Banking Corporation Limited ( (AU:BBC) ).

BNK Banking Corporation Limited announced that it will release its full-year financial results for the year ending 30 June 2025 on 28 August 2025. Following the release, the CEO and CFO will present the results via a Zoom webinar. This announcement is part of BNK’s ongoing efforts to engage with shareholders and provide transparency about its financial performance.

More about BNK Banking Corporation Limited

BNK Banking Corporation Limited, founded in 1982 as Goldfields Credit Union, is a branchless bank offering a diverse range of financial products. It operates under two brands, Goldfields Money and Better Choice, and serves as a ‘one-stop’ shop for brokers. The company has a strong distribution network and award-winning brands, contributing to its solid performance in recent years.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

The latest update is out from Mito Securities Co., Ltd. ( (JP:8622) ).

Mito Securities Co., Ltd. announced the completion of the interim review of its non-consolidated financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, with no changes to the previously disclosed figures. The company reported a significant year-on-year decline in operating revenue and profits, reflecting challenges in the current market environment. Despite the downturn, Mito Securities maintains a stable capital ratio and has set a minimum annual dividend for the coming years, indicating a commitment to shareholder returns.

Tat Seng Packaging Group Ltd ( (SG:T12) ) has provided an update.

Tat Seng Packaging Group Ltd has announced a mandatory unconditional cash offer by Dr. Goi Seng Hui to acquire all issued and paid-up ordinary shares not already owned or controlled by him. The offer price is set at S$0.899 per share, based on the average traded prices on the Singapore Exchange. This move could potentially impact the company’s operations and market positioning, as it involves a significant acquisition of shares, potentially altering shareholder dynamics and control.

data.description:

TBS HOLDINGS INC. ( (JP:9401) ) has provided an announcement.

TBS HOLDINGS, INC. has announced the acquisition of 2,487,300 treasury shares through the Off-Auction Treasury Shares Repurchase Trading System (ToSTNeT-3) on August 8, 2025.
